LanguageData.Sylvie_TraderAlreadyInOrbit: The trader is already in nearby orbit.
LanguageData.Sylvie_TraderArrived: A clothing trade ship has entered comm range.
LanguageData.Sylvie_OfferText:
A merchant pulls you aside.

Merchant: "Dear customer, a nobleman went bankrupt recently, and I benefited somewhat from that. But along with it, they also left me some things I don't particularly care for — like this slave."

He points to a female slave covered in scars. She looks very young, curled up tightly in a corner.

Merchant: "If you don't mind, I could sell this slave to you at quite a low price. She has all her limbs intact and can do plenty of work. Besides, everyone around here knows you've been tending to our wounds all by yourself — consider this repayment for saving my life."

Should you take this girl in?
LanguageData.Sylvie_PayAndTakeHer: Pay {0} silver and take her in
LanguageData.Sylvie_TradeSuccess: Trade successful. Sylvie has joined the colony.
